components.name: Eye-Eye Rotoblade
components.description:
A machine element used to propel robotic organisms through coolant.

Source: Dismantled from Eye-Eye servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Eye-Eye in Orb Vallis ponds during Warm weather. Also drops from resource containers across the Orb Vallis.

components.name: Goblite Tears
components.description:
Polished and cut to perfection.

Blueprint sold by Smokefinger in Fortuna on Venus.

components.name: Gorgaricus Spore
components.description:
The reproductive spore of the giant Vallis fungi is highly coveted for the complex chemical compounds it contains.

Location: Orb Vallis on Venus

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void
